name: Pratithi Investments
overview: Provider of financial investments and strategic assistance to innovation and enterprise. The company invests in venture and private equity funds across stages. overview: Provider of evergreen capital for long-term investments in various sectors. The firm focuses on building and supporting businesses for the long term. name: Patni Financial Advisors
overview: The Patni Family Office invests in a wide range of asset classes such as equity, debt, real estate, commodities, joint ventures, and other financial structures.

name: Mehta Ventures
overview: Early-stage startup investment firm providing capital, expertise, and connections for growth. They aim to add value through access to the India market, leveraging a deep network built over decades of technology entrepreneurship and investments. They offer corporate and family office introductions for later-stage funding. They provide capital, functional expertise, and connections to help early-stage ventures build, grow, and scale. Their value add includes expertise in scaling a business, understanding the India market, and connecting startups with the right partners. They offer patient capital and entrepreneurial orientation.
